CREATE TABLE test_strings (haystack String, needles Array(String));
SELECT multiSearchFirstIndexUTF8(haystack, ['Hello', 'Goodbye']) FROM test_strings WHERE haystack = 'Hello World';
WITH (SELECT haystack FROM test_strings WHERE haystack LIKE '%World%') AS filtered_haystack SELECT multiSearchFirstIndexUTF8(filtered_haystack, ['World']) FROM test_strings;
CREATE TABLE test_results AS SELECT haystack, multiSearchFirstIndexUTF8(haystack, needles) AS result FROM test_strings;
SELECT result FROM test_results WHERE result > 0;
SELECT multiSearchFirstIndexUTF8(haystack, needles) AS index FROM test_strings WHERE index = 0;
SELECT multiSearchFirstIndexUTF8('Testing UTF8 Support', ['UTF8', 'Support']) AS index;
SELECT multiSearchFirstIndexUTF8('Case Insensitive Test', ['case', 'insensitive']) AS index;
SELECT multiSearchFirstIndexUTF8('Edge cases: empty strings', []) AS index;
